summary: `npx vitest run tests/warm-pool-single.test.ts` passed: 1 file, 2 tests. I inspected the test and production code: the test imports the real `MultiRuntimePool`, asserts warmed runtimes are exactly `classifier` and `operative`, and source-pins the gateway to one primary `operative` runtime. Production `MultiRuntimePool` keys pools only by runtime id, while gateway/model-router code applies `/model` and `/effort` through the slash-inject path rather than pool partitioning.
